headline: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Humana (HUM)
summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) is one of the 7 Best Turnaround Stocks to Buy in 2026. On June 8, 2026, Mizuho raised the firm’s price target on Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) to $390 from $335 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said the managed care sector is entering a “more stable and predictable” […]
